data.title: Sheryl Sandberg Testimony In Meta Antitrust Trial Touches On Efforts To Stifle Ads From Google Plus, KakaoTalk — Mark Zuckerberg Says TikTok Bigger Than Facebook, Instagram Combined
data.description: Former Meta COO Sheryl Sandberg testified in an antitrust trial, revealing efforts to block ads from competitors like Google Plus and KakaoTalk, while Mark Zuckerberg acknowledged TikTok's dominance over Facebook and Instagram.

data.title: TikTok's US Policy Chief Steps Down As Bidding War Heats Up After Trump Extends Deadline: Report
data.description: TikTok's U.S. public policy chief, Michael Beckerman, is leaving his Washington-based role to transition to a global advisory position.

data.title: Former Google CEO Eric Schmidt Predicts AI Sprint Toward Super Intelligence Could Put 'Smartest Human' In Every Pocket In 6 Years
data.description: Eric Schmidt predicts AI will surpass human talent in 12-20 years. By 2031, super-intelligence may emerge. Society must prepare for this impact.

data.title: Netflix's $1 Trillion Goal 'Very Realistic', Says Former Cable Executive: 'It's Not That Hard To Get There'
data.description: Former President of NBC Cable (now NBCUniversal Media), Tom Rogers has been bullish on Netflix (NASDAQ: NFLX) for several years. He now believes that the company's 5-year plan to hit $1 trillion in market capitalization by 2030 is "very realistic," and not "that hard to get."

data.title: Solana Breaks Free From Bitcoin, Ethereum Lag After Cathie Wood's Ark Invest Accumulates New SOL Staking ETF
data.description: Solana (CRYPTO: SOL) defied the standstill in other large-cap cryptocurrencies on Wednesday following the impressive launch of its exchange-traded fund in Canada.
